view.title: Lee Weebụsaịtị {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Ị dị mma ịziga ozi email nnabata ọzọ?
view.emailSentMessage: Ezigaala ozi email nnabata ọzọ. Lelee ịgwọ gị.

buyIp.title: Zụta Nkenwe IP Ọzọ
buyIp.costDescription: Ọnụahịa ({symbol}) kwa ọnwa ka a na-ebipụta ụgwọ weebụsaịtị gị
buyIp.confirmMessage: Ọnụahịa IP ọzọ: {symbol}{cost}/ọnwa. Ị dị mma ịwu IP ọzọ?

migration.title: Bugharị Weebụsaịtị Gị
migration.holdingPageQuestion: Ọ bụrụ na saịtị na-arụ ọrụ/na-ata ọkụ nwere ọsọ dị elu, anyị nwere ike itọ peeji nọchi n'oge ibugharị?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Saịtị a nwere mkpa pụrụ iche dị ka Ụdị PHP / Modul?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Ị chọrọ na anyị nyere gị aka ibugharị ndebanye aha domain?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Ị chọrọ na anyị melite name servers ozugbo anyị mechaa ibugharị data?
migration.note1: Ịjupụta foọmụ a ga-emepụta tiketi ọhụụ maka ngalaba nkwado anyị iji bido ibugharị gị.
migration.note2: Biko bụrụ zuru ezu ma ziri ezi iji zere mgbochi ọ bụla.
migration.note3: Ibugharị ndabara mechara n'ime awa 48 ruo 72. Oge ụfọdụ ogologo oge ma ọ bụrụ na data ka a ga-edepụo dị nnukwu.
migration.note4: Akaụntụ hosting ochie kwesịrị ịnọ n'ịntanetị ma dị n'otu oge anyị na-arụ ọrụ ibugharị, ma ọ bụghị anyị nwere ike ihu ike.
migration.note5: Biko emela mmelite ọ bụla na saịtị gị ka anyị na-arụ ọrụ ibugharị, ma ọ bụghị data ndị ahụ nwere ike ịghị adọghị na hosting ọhụụ.
